Newmont Corporation, a Delaware corporation (" Newmont "), issued a press release announcing that it has now secured all of the government regulatory approvals necessary to proceed with its previously announced transaction (the " Transaction ") with Newcrest Mining Limited (" Newcrest ").
The press release is attached hereto as Exhibit 99.1 and is incorporated h

Newmont Corporation, a Delaware corporation (" Newmont " or the " Company "), issued a press release announcing the date of a special meeting of stockholders and the filing of its definitive proxy statement for its proposed acquisition of Newcrest Mining Limited (" Newcrest ").

Corporation, a Delaware corporation (" Newmont " or the " Company "), issued a press release announcing that following a review by the Australian Competition & Consumer Commission (" ACCC "), the agency has cleared the Company to proceed with its proposed acquisition of Newcrest Mining Limited (" Newcrest ") and that the ACCC is expected to convey

Newmont Corporation, a Delaware corporation (" Newmont " or the " Company "), issued a press release announcing that the Korea Fair Trade Commission has cleared the Company to proceed with its previously announced transaction with Newcrest Mining Limited (" Newcrest ") and that the transaction did not violate Korea's Monopoly Regulation and Fair Tr

Newmont Corporation, a Delaware corporation (" Newmont " or the " Company "), issued a press release announcing that the Papua New Guinea's Independent Consumer & Competition Commission granted clearance for the Company to proceed with their previously announced transaction with Newcrest Mining Limited (" Newcrest ").
Earnings Announcement (Reported EPS: 0.33 vs Est: 0.45, Surprise: -26.93%)

Newmont Corporation, a Delaware corporation (" Newmont " or the " Company "), issued a press release announcing that the Canadian Competition Bureau issued a "no action" letter clearing Newmont's previously announced transaction with Newcrest Mining Limited (" Newcrest ") under Canadian competition law.

Corporation, a Delaware corporation (" Newmont " or the " Company "), issued a press release announcing that it will defer the full-funds investment decision for the Yanacocha Sulfides Project in Peru for at least two years to advance its portfolio optimization strategy.

Corporation, a Delaware corporation (" Newmont " or the " Company "),  posted on its website, www.newmont.com, an investor presentation that includes, among other matters, information related to the pending transaction whereby Newmont Overseas Holdings Pty Ltd, an Australian proprietary company limited by shares and an indirect wholly owned subsidi

Delaware Corporation (the " Corporation "), posted on its website, www.newmont.com, an earnings presentation that includes, among other matters, information related to the potential transaction to acquire all of the issued share capital of Newcrest Mining Limited (" Newcrest ").
Earnings Announcement (Reported EPS: 0.4 vs Est: 0.32, Surprise: +24.90%)

Corporation, issued a press release announcing that it submitted a revised non-binding indicative proposal to acquire 100% of the issued share capital of Newcrest Mining Limited ("Newcrest") and that the Newcrest board of directors agreed to grant Newmont confirmatory due diligence access.
Newmont held a related live webcast presentation on February 23, 2023 at 10:00 a.m.
